articles.author: Samuel Petrequin
articles.title: French lawmakers approve a sweeping social media ban for children under 15 - AP News
articles.description: French lawmakers have approved a bill banning children under 15 from using social media. The move makes France the first country in the European Union to pass a blanket ban on platforms as concerns grow worldwide over the harmful effects of digital content on…
articles.content: PARIS (AP) France banned children under 15 from using social media on Tuesday, becoming the first country in the European Union to pass a blanket ban on the platforms as concerns grow worldwide over … [+4962 chars]
